title: ChatGPT Health Now Available Nationwide: Integrates with Apple Health and Electronic Medical Records, It Can Now Understand Your Physical Examination Report
excerpt: OpenAI has handed out a key to all users in the U.S. who are 18 years old and above today — officially removing the waitlist and fully launching the new Health
content_html:
OpenAI has handed out a key to all users in the U.S. who are 18 years old and above today — officially removing the waitlist and fully launching the new Health (Health) feature. Whether you use the free version, Go, Plus, or Pro version, you can directly turn on this experience in the ChatGPT sidebar on both the web and iOS platforms.

This demand has been rising for a while. According to OpenAI's statistics, the number of users asking health and wellness-related questions on ChatGPT has risen from 230 million in the early stages to over 300 million. Based on feedback from several months of testing, this health experience has undergone multiple upgrades: the system can now connect with Apple Health and read electronic medical records from One Medical, Function Health, and several hospital systems in the U.S.

After user authorization, ChatGPT can combine data such as medication, lab results, medical records, sleep, and daily exercise to analyze and provide truly personalized health answers — for example, comparing your latest lab results with previous data, summarizing physical changes since your last visit, or assessing the impact of sleep and exercise on your daily condition.

Interestingly, during early testing, OpenAI found that many people did not always ask questions in the dedicated health section. Therefore, ChatGPT now supports using health data outside the dedicated area: users can either type "@Health" to explicitly bring in the health context, or authorize ChatGPT to refer to personal health background when answering everyday questions — automatically avoiding dietary restrictions when recommending meals, or avoiding recent injury areas when planning physical activities. By default, the system will always ask for permission before accessing linked health data, and users can choose single-use authorization or permanent permission.

On the issue of privacy, OpenAI made it clear in its official statement: all medical records, Apple Health data, and conversation content generated using these data will not be used to train large language models or for targeted advertising. Bringing your medical records to a chatbot to read them has raised both the threshold and the trust factor, which have now been put on the table.

blocks.html_en: OpenAI has handed out a key to all users in the U.S. who are 18 years old and above today — officially removing the waitlist and fully launching the new Health (Health) feature. Whether you use the free version, Go, Plus, or Pro version, you can directly turn on this experience in the ChatGPT sidebar on both the web and iOS platforms.

sentences.en: OpenAI has handed out a key to all users in the U.S. who are 18 years old and above today — officially removing the waitlist and fully launching the new Health (Health) feature.
sentences.zh: 今天，OpenAI 向所有美国 18 岁及以上用户发放了一把钥匙——正式取消候补名单，并全面推出新的健康（Health）功能。

sentences.en: Whether you use the free version, Go, Plus, or Pro version, you can directly turn on this experience in the ChatGPT sidebar on both the web and iOS platforms.
sentences.zh: 无论您使用免费版本、Go、Plus 还是 Pro 版本，您都可以在 Web 和 iOS 平台上的 ChatGPT 侧边栏中直接开启此体验。

blocks.html_en: This demand has been rising for a while. According to OpenAI's statistics, the number of users asking health and wellness-related questions on ChatGPT has risen from 230 million in the early stages to over 300 million. Based on feedback from several months of testing, this health experience has undergone multiple upgrades: the system can now connect with Apple Health and read electronic medical records from One Medical, Function Health, and several hospital systems in the U.S.

sentences.en: This demand has been rising for a while.
sentences.zh: 这种需求已经上升了一段时间。

sentences.en: According to OpenAI's statistics, the number of users asking health and wellness-related questions on ChatGPT has risen from 230 million in the early stages to over 300 million.
sentences.zh: 据OpenAI统计，ChatGPT上询问健康养生相关问题的用户数量已从早期的2.3亿上升至超过3亿。

sentences.en: Based on feedback from several months of testing, this health experience has undergone multiple upgrades: the system can now connect with Apple Health and read electronic medical records from One Medical, Function Health, and several hospital systems in the U.S.
sentences.zh: 根据几个月的测试反馈，这一健康体验经历了多次升级：系统现在可以与Apple Health连接，读取One Medical、Function Health以及美国多家医院系统的电子病历。

blocks.html_en: After user authorization, ChatGPT can combine data such as medication, lab results, medical records, sleep, and daily exercise to analyze and provide truly personalized health answers — for example, comparing your latest lab results with previous data, summarizing physical changes since your last visit, or assessing the impact of sleep and exercise on your daily condition.

sentences.en: After user authorization, ChatGPT can combine data such as medication, lab results, medical records, sleep, and daily exercise to analyze and provide truly personalized health answers — for example, comparing your latest lab results with previous data, summarizing physical changes since your last visit, or assessing the impact of sleep and exercise on your daily condition.
sentences.zh: 经过用户授权后，ChatGPT 可以结合用药、化验结果、病历、睡眠和日常锻炼等数据进行分析并提供真正个性化的健康答案——例如，将您最新的化验结果与之前的数据进行比较、总结自上次就诊以来的身体变化，或者评估睡眠和锻炼对您日常状况的影响。

blocks.html_en: Interestingly, during early testing, OpenAI found that many people did not always ask questions in the dedicated health section. Therefore, ChatGPT now supports using health data outside the dedicated area: users can either type "@Health" to explicitly bring in the health context, or authorize ChatGPT to refer to personal health background when answering everyday questions — automatically avoiding dietary restrictions when recommending meals, or avoiding recent injury areas when planning physical activities. By default, the system will always ask for permission before accessing linked health data, and users can choose single-use authorization or permanent permission.

sentences.en: Interestingly, during early testing, OpenAI found that many people did not always ask questions in the dedicated health section.
sentences.zh: 有趣的是，在早期测试过程中，OpenAI 发现很多人并不总是在专门的健康部分提问。

sentences.en: Therefore, ChatGPT now supports using health data outside the dedicated area: users can either type "@Health" to explicitly bring in the health context, or authorize ChatGPT to refer to personal health background when answering everyday questions — automatically avoiding dietary restrictions when recommending meals, or avoiding recent injury areas when planning physical activities.
sentences.zh: 因此，ChatGPT 现在支持在专用区域之外使用健康数据：用户可以输入“@Health”来明确引入健康背景，也可以授权 ChatGPT 在回答日常问题时参考个人健康背景——在推荐膳食时自动避开饮食限制，或在计划体育活动时避开近期受伤部位。

sentences.en: By default, the system will always ask for permission before accessing linked health data, and users can choose single-use authorization or permanent permission.
sentences.zh: 默认情况下，系统在访问链接的健康数据之前总是会请求许可，用户可以选择一次性授权或永久许可。

blocks.html_en: On the issue of privacy, OpenAI made it clear in its official statement: all medical records, Apple Health data, and conversation content generated using these data will not be used to train large language models or for targeted advertising. Bringing your medical records to a chatbot to read them has raised both the threshold and the trust factor, which have now been put on the table.

sentences.en: On the issue of privacy, OpenAI made it clear in its official statement: all medical records, Apple Health data, and conversation content generated using these data will not be used to train large language models or for targeted advertising.
sentences.zh: 在隐私问题上，OpenAI在官方声明中明确表示：所有医疗记录、Apple Health数据以及使用这些数据生成的对话内容都不会用于训练大型语言模型或用于定向广告。

sentences.en: Bringing your medical records to a chatbot to read them has raised both the threshold and the trust factor, which have now been put on the table.
sentences.zh: 将你的医疗记录交给聊天机器人来阅读，既提高了门槛，也提高了信任度，现在这些都已经摆在桌面上。

content_html_zh:
今天，OpenAI 向所有美国 18 岁及以上用户发放了一把钥匙——正式取消候补名单，并全面推出新的健康（Health）功能。 无论您使用免费版本、Go、Plus 还是 Pro 版本，您都可以在 Web 和 iOS 平台上的 ChatGPT 侧边栏中直接开启此体验。

这种需求已经上升了一段时间。 据OpenAI统计，ChatGPT上询问健康养生相关问题的用户数量已从早期的2.3亿上升至超过3亿。 根据几个月的测试反馈，这一健康体验经历了多次升级：系统现在可以与Apple Health连接，读取One Medical、Function Health以及美国多家医院系统的电子病历。

经过用户授权后，ChatGPT 可以结合用药、化验结果、病历、睡眠和日常锻炼等数据进行分析并提供真正个性化的健康答案——例如，将您最新的化验结果与之前的数据进行比较、总结自上次就诊以来的身体变化，或者评估睡眠和锻炼对您日常状况的影响。

有趣的是，在早期测试过程中，OpenAI 发现很多人并不总是在专门的健康部分提问。 因此，ChatGPT 现在支持在专用区域之外使用健康数据：用户可以输入“@Health”来明确引入健康背景，也可以授权 ChatGPT 在回答日常问题时参考个人健康背景——在推荐膳食时自动避开饮食限制，或在计划体育活动时避开近期受伤部位。 默认情况下，系统在访问链接的健康数据之前总是会请求许可，用户可以选择一次性授权或永久许可。

在隐私问题上，OpenAI在官方声明中明确表示：所有医疗记录、Apple Health数据以及使用这些数据生成的对话内容都不会用于训练大型语言模型或用于定向广告。 将你的医疗记录交给聊天机器人来阅读，既提高了门槛，也提高了信任度，现在这些都已经摆在桌面上。
